---
title: "Reports"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Applied guidance</span>

# Reports for evaluators

This section turns source guidance into practical evaluator-facing reports. Reports are separate from the Notes section and are not included in the notes network diagram.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>Applied VfM</span>
  <span>Evaluator guidance</span>
  <span>Defence context</span>
</div>
:::

## Available Reports {#available-reports .section-heading}

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-source">Report</span>

### [Defence VfM Guidance](defence-vfm-guidance.qmd)

Guidance for applying rubric-based value for money evaluation to defence capability, digital and cyber, infrastructure, and personnel programmes.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-source">Report</span>

### [Defence VfI Rubric Generation](defence-vfi-rubric-generation.qmd)

Guidance for generating defence Value for Investment criteria, subcriteria, performance standards, and evidence plans.
:::
:::

</div>
